description: Simple data query: '¿cuánto levanté en deadlift la semana pasada?' Must route to data lookup only. Zero escalation. Zero state mutations to cascade domains. Efficiency note: no QUESTION category in classifier.

events.text: ¿cuánto levanté en deadlift la semana pasada?

mock_llm_responses.workout_agent_0: La semana pasada (semana 6): Deadlift 3x3 @ 140kg. e1RM estimado: ~162kg.

assertions.msg: Simple query must not mutate any cascade or planning domains

expected_flaws: EFFICIENCY NOTE (not a correctness failure): No QUESTION category in Haiku intent classifier. Simple data query routes to WorkoutAdvisorAgent (Sonnet + sheet load) instead of a cheap targeted lookup. Phase 3 fix: add QUESTION category.
